stemHtml: Which of the following should be filled in the general declaration form?

options.a: the nature of goods embarked on the aircraft (e.g. dangerous goods).
options.b: aircraft registration mark, flight number, date and place of departure, destination, and number of crew and passengers.
options.c: passenger names, passenger addresses, and other personal data.
options.d: a complete description of payload (passengers, cargo, mail).
